title: AgentWatch launches runtime budgets for runaway AI agents
friendlyTitle: AgentWatch helps stop AI agents from overspending
summary: AgentWatch positions itself as a runtime control plane that sits between apps and LLM providers, enforcing session-level budgets before calls happen and flagging loops or excessive usage.
friendlySummary: AgentWatch is a tool that can block AI requests when an agent is using too much money or getting stuck in a loop.
whyItMatters: Agent cost control is moving from dashboards to enforcement. Developers building agentic products can reduce surprise bills by adding spending limits at the request path instead of discovering overruns after the fact.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This helps teams use AI agents without waking up to a scary API bill. Tiny budget bouncer, big peace of mind.
